hooks.command: COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -E 'git\s+commit' > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '🔍 Running detekt with auto-fix...' && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && ./gradlew detektFormat && if ! git diff --exit-code > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '📝 detektFormat made changes, auto-staging them...' && git add -u && echo '✅ Formatted files staged and ready to commit!'; else echo '✅ detekt checks passed!'; fi || (echo '❌ detekt check failed. Please fix the issues before committing.' && exit 2); fi
